title: Elasticity
wikitext:
[[File:Madame_Rouge_vs_Kid_Flash.gif|thumb|right|400px|Madame Rouge using her elasticity to cut off Kid Flash's escape]]

==Summary==
'''Elasticity''' is the ability to stretch, elongate, flex, and twist, and otherwise manipulate one's body into impossible shapes for various purposes. The limits and applications of this ability vary from user to user, and it may sometimes grant them additional properties akin to other elastic substances. Particularly skilled users can emulate [[Shapeshifting]] by molding their bodies into the forms of others.

==Users==
*[[Mister Fantastic]] ([[Marvel Comics]])
*[[Monkey D. Luffy]] ([[One Piece]])
*[[Franmalth]] ([[Fairy Tail]])
*[[Piccolo]] and [[Majin Buu]] ([[Dragon Ball]])
*[[Ben Tennyson (Original)|Various Aliens]] ([[Ben 10 (Classic)|Ben 10]])
*[[Martian Manhunter (Post-Crisis)|Martian Manhunter]], Plastic Man, Elongated Man, and Madame Rouge ([[DC Comics]])
*[[Elastigirl]] ([[The Incredibles]])
